name: Update README with latest posts on: schedule: - cron: "0 0 * * *" workflow_dispatch: permissions: contents: write jobs: update-readme: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v4 - uses: gautamkrishnar/blog-post-workflow@v1 with: feed_list: "https://blog.sngchn.dev/rss.xml" max_post_count: 5 template: '$title $date
' date_format: "yy.mm.dd"
